# @peerlytics/sdk

Query ZKP2P P2P protocol data on Base: rates, orderbooks, maker portfolios, and live activity.

## SDK

Package: @peerlytics/sdk (npm)
Install: npm install @peerlytics/sdk

```ts
import { Peerlytics } from "@peerlytics/sdk";
const client = new Peerlytics({ apiKey: "pk_live_..." }); // required (each key includes 1000 free requests/month)
```

## Response shapes (SDK vs raw HTTP)

The SDK methods below return the inner payload directly ‚Äî you don't see any envelope. If you're calling the HTTP API without the SDK, note:

- Most `/api/v1/*` endpoints wrap the payload in `{ success, data }` ‚Äî read `response.data`
- List endpoints return a paginated object inside `data`, not a raw array:
  - `/deposits` ‚Üí `{ deposits, count, hasMore, limit, offset, filters }`
  - `/intents` ‚Üí `{ intents, count, hasMore, limit, offset, filters }`
  - `/activity` ‚Üí `{ events, count, hasMore, limit, offset, filters }` (iterate over `events`, not the top level)
  - `/market/summary` ‚Üí `{ markets, count, hasMore, ... }`
- Exceptions with no envelope: `/analytics/summary|overview|leaderboard` and `/account/*`

## Required filters (throws `ValidationError` client-side)

- `client.getDeposits(filters)` ‚Äî at least one of `depositor`, `delegate`, `platform`, `currency`
- `client.getIntents(filters)` ‚Äî at least one of `owner`, `recipient`, `verifier`, `depositId`, `status`

The SDK fails fast before hitting the network; the raw API returns a 400 `missing_filter` with the same guidance.

## Currency hashes vs codes

On-chain, currencies are stored as `bytes32`. Fields to know on deposit responses:

- `DepositMarket.currency` and each `deposit.currencies[].currency` ‚Äî resolved ISO code (e.g. `"GBP"`)
- `DepositMarket.currencyCode` and each `deposit.currencies[].currencyCode` ‚Äî raw bytes32 hash (e.g. `0xc4ae21...`)

If you need your own mapping, `client.getCurrencies()` returns every supported currency with its `code`, `label`, `flag`, and all matching hashes.

## Methods

Analytics:
- client.getProtocolSummary() - protocol MTD/QTD/YTD/all-time volume, liquidity, deposits
- client.getLeaderboard({ limit?, offset? }) - top makers/takers by volume, APR, profit
- client.getProtocolOverview(range) - full analytics overview for mtd, 3mtd, ytd, all

Market:
- client.getMarketSummary({ currency?, platform?, includeRates?, limit?, offset? }) - rate stats per pair
- client.getOrderbook({ currency?, platform?, minSize? }) - live orderbook by rate level

Explorer:
- client.getDeposit(id, { limit?, offset? }) - deposit detail with intents
- client.getDeposits({ depositor?, delegate?, platform?, currency?, status?, accepting?, limit?, offset? }) - query deposits ‚Äî **at least one of depositor/delegate/platform/currency is required**; returns `{ deposits, count, hasMore, ... }`
- client.getIntent(hash) - intent detail
- client.getIntents({ owner?, recipient?, verifier?, depositId?, status?, limit?, offset? }) - query intents ‚Äî **at least one of owner/recipient/verifier/depositId/status is required**; returns `{ intents, count, hasMore, ... }`
- client.getAddress(address, { limit?, offset? }) - address profile with stats
- client.getMaker(address) - maker portfolio with allocations and profit
- client.getTaker(address) - taker portfolio: fills, tier, lock score, currency/platform mix
- client.getIntegrator(code, { windowDays? }) - ERC-8021 integrator rollup: volume, unique makers, top markets, recent deposits
- client.getPlatform(platform, { windowDays? }) - platform rollup: currencies, makers, takers, recent intents
- client.getDelegate(address) - delegate rollup: rate managers, delegated deposits, PnL
- client.getVerifier(address, { limit?, offset? }) - verifier stats and breakdown
- client.getVault(id, { days? }) - vault detail with snapshots
- client.search(query, { type?, role?, limit?, offset? }) - multi-type search

Each explorer entity above also has a canonical page at peerlytics.xyz/explorer/<entity>/<slug> ‚Äî the SDK method and the page are siblings.

Time-series (Pro, 20 credits/call):
- client.getTimeseries({ entity: "volume" | "deposits" | "intents", granularity?: "hour" | "day", from?, to? }) - bucketed rollups. Hour-granularity is capped at 2000 buckets/call.

Activity:
- client.getActivity({ type?, depositId?, address?, rateManagerId?, since?, limit?, offset? }) - live protocol events ‚Äî returns `{ events, count, hasMore, ... }`, iterate over `result.events` (not a raw array)
- client.streamActivity({ type?, rateManagerId?, since?, intervalMs?, limit? }, { signal? }) - SSE real-time event stream (returns ReadableStream<LiveEvent>)

History:
- client.getMakerHistory(address) - maker historical stats
- client.getTakerHistory(address) - taker historical stats

Metadata:
- client.getCurrencies() - supported fiat currencies
- client.getPlatforms() - supported payment platforms

Vaults:
- client.getVaultsOverview() - all vaults with AUM, fees, snapshots
- client.getVault(id, { days? }) - vault detail with snapshots

Account:
- client.listKeys() - list API keys
- client.createKey(label?) - create key
- client.rotateKey(oldKey) - rotate key
- client.deleteKey(key) - delete key
- client.getCredits() - credit balance and packages
- client.createCheckout(pkg) - purchase credits (starter/growth/scale)

## Auth

1. API key: set PEERLYTICS_API_KEY env var or pass { apiKey: "pk_live_..." }. Each key includes 1000 free requests/month. Generate via peerlytics.xyz/developers or programmatically with client.createKey().
2. x402: pay per request with USDC on Base, no key needed

## Errors

```ts
import { PeerlyticsError, RateLimitError, NotFoundError, ValidationError } from "@peerlytics/sdk";
```

Types: ActivityStreamFilters, ActivityStreamEvent (for streamActivity)

## Examples in this repo

- volume-dashboard.ts: protocol stats terminal dashboard
- rate-monitor.ts: poll rates, alert on threshold
- orderbook-snapshot.ts: multi-currency orderbook depth
- maker-report.ts: portfolio report for a maker address
- integrator-report.ts: ERC-8021 integrator stats (deposits, volume, top markets)
- timeseries-chart.ts: hourly/daily rollups in a terminal sparkbar chart
- live-activity.ts: real-time protocol event stream
- webhook-receiver.ts: HMAC-verified HTTPS receiver for outbound webhooks
- x402-agent.ts: x402 pay-per-request flow walkthrough

## Links

- API docs: https://peerlytics.xyz/developers
- SDK: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@peerlytics/sdk
- OpenAPI: https://peerlytics.xyz/api/openapi
- LLM context: https://peerlytics.xyz/llms.txt
- Protocol: https://zkp2p.xyz
